author: Lalta Prasad, Pandit Chitranshi
title: Dharm Raj Genealogy
gloss: A book which traces the origin of the Kayasthas, with quotations from the Sacred Hindu Books.
copyright: P. Lalta Prasad, Chitranshi, Delhi; No. 63, dated the 27th April 1910.

author: Mittar Sain, Swami
title: Sri Sant Binaya
gloss: A book on Vedanta in which the writer describes the transitoriness of the world and the unstableness of the ties of relationship.

author: Muhammad Hussain, Dr., Sayad
title: Pir Mihr Ali Shah ka apni nisbat ap hi kufr ka Fatwa
gloss: For subject see entry No. 33 at page 40 of the catalogue for the quarter ending the 31st December, 1909.
notes: Cross-reference: entry No. 33, page 40, quarter ending 31st December 1909.

author: Muhammad Hussain, Dr., Sayad
title: Tariq-i-Falah
gloss: For subject see entry No. 34 at page 40 of the catalogue for the quarter ending the 31st December, 1909.
notes: Author given as dash. Cross-reference: entry No. 34, page 40, quarter ending 31st December 1909.

author: Muhammad Itar Shah
title: Tuhfa-i-Shia
gloss: An account of a controversy held at Fandar in the Jammu and Kashmir State between the Sunnis and the Shias.

author: Muhammad Sadiq, Mufti
title: Kaffarah
gloss: A pamphlet directed against the Christian belief in atonement.

author: Muhammad Salih, Maulvi
title: Masail-i-ul-Ma
gloss: A booklet, first of a series entitled Silsila-i-Islam, giving in the form of questions and answers the decisions of famous Muhammadan theologians on the purity and impurity of water.

author: Muhammad Zahur-ud-din, Akmal
title: Sunnat-i-Ahmadiya
gloss: The doctrines on daily prayers, fasts, alms, divorce and marriage from the point of view of Mirzais or the followers of Mirza Ghulam Ahmad of Qádián.
